channel.title: Business on The Beige Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Business on The Beige Journal

item.title: 10 side hustles for extra money online in 2025
item.description:
Are you a student looking for ways to make some extra cash?

If you’re tired of the traditional part-time jobs and want something more flexible, then you’re in luck! In this blog post, we’ll be discussing 10 side hustles that students can start without any expensive investments. From reselling vintage clothes to offering tutoring services, there’s something here for everyone. So, if you’re ready to turn your free time into money, keep reading!

Watch the video

https://youtu.be/uugQDhTTdN4

Ideas mentioned:

  • Depop

  • Etsy (40 FREE listings to get you started):

  • Redbubble

  • Teespring

  • Stuvia

  • Docsity

  • Slice the Pie

  • WordPress Hosting

  • Substack

  • Amazon Associates

  • ShareASale

  • Upwork

  • Fiverr

  • Wyzant

  • Chegg Tutors

  • Hootsuite

  • Buffer

  • Rover

  • Wag!

item.title: 20 EASY digital products to create in Canva
item.description:
Are you looking for a way to turn your creativity into a profitable venture? If so, then you need to check out this video on 20 easy digital products that you can create and sell using Canva.

In the video, I go over a variety of digital products that you can create.

Canva is a user-friendly platform that makes it easy to create professional-looking digital products. With Canva, you can customize your products to fit your unique style and brand. Once you’ve created your products, you can sell them on a variety of platforms, such as Etsy, Amazon, and your own website.

Watch the video

https://youtu.be/Mpucx0PohTc

item.title: How to make money from home with side hustles for busy moms
item.description:
Are you a busy mom looking for ways to make extra money from home? If so, you’re in luck! There are many ways to earn passive income online, even if you don’t have a lot of time.

In this blog post, we will discuss 15 online passive income ideas that are perfect for moms. These ideas include everything from investing in dividend stocks to selling digital products on Etsy.

Watch the video:

https://youtu.be/cPvtua_ebtI

Ideas mentioned:

Investing in Dividend Stocks

  • Robinhood

  • Wealthsimple

Renting Property

  • Airbnb

Affiliate Marketing

  • Amazon Associates

Creating and Selling Online Courses

  • Udemy

Print-on-Demand

  • Printify

  • Shopify (for store setup)

Selling Digital Products on Etsy

  • Etsy - Get 40 free listings with this link!

Creating Content on YouTube

  • Tubebuddy

Investing in REITs

item.title: 15 ways to make money online without any money in 2025
item.description:
Are you looking for ways to make money online without spending any money upfront? If so, you’re in luck!

In this video, we explore some of the top ways to earn money online without any initial investment. From freelance writing to online surveys and virtual assistance, there are a variety of opportunities available for people of all skill levels.

https://youtu.be/JRnUnna_KQQ

item.title: Faceless Digital Marketing tips for Beginners
item.description:
https://youtu.be/MZh4ysv_QDQ

This video is a comprehensive guide to succeeding in faceless digital marketing.

Here are some key advice:

  1. Invest in Learning: Prioritize understanding digital marketing principles through free resources like blogs and YouTube tutorials.

  2. Pick a Profitable Niche: Focus on niches that align with personal interests and expertise, such as wealth creation or travel.

  3. Branding Beyond Aesthetics: Develop a brand that reflects your personality and creates a genuine connection with your audience.

  4. Provide Value: Ensure every piece of content serves a purpose, whether it’s educating, entertaining, or inspiring.

  5. Focus on Quality Over Quantity: Produce high-quality content rather than overwhelming your audience with volume.

  6. Keep Reels Short: Optimize content for short attention spans, aiming for 3 to 7 seconds per reel.

item.title: How to make money online with no money
item.description:
Think you need capital to start earning online? Think again! This post is packed with proven strategies to generate income without breaking the bank. Discover how to leverage your skills, time, and creativity to build a profitable online venture from scratch. Get ready to unlock your earning potential and turn your dreams into reality.

Let’s dive in!

https://youtu.be/JRnUnna_KQQ

Freelance Writing

Freelance writing is a fantastic way to earn money online if you have a knack for words. There are several platforms where you can offer your writing services:

  • Upwork

  • Fiverr

  • Textbroker

  • iWriter

Online Surveys

Participating in online surveys is an easy way to make some extra cash. These websites pay you for sharing your opinions on different products and services:

item.title: How to make 100+ reels in under 5 mins for your faceless digital marketing
item.description:
Ever feel stuck staring at your phone, willing an Instagram Reel idea into existence? Been there! This video’s got your back with a super cool time-saving trick to crank out 100 Reels like whoa! We’re talking about repurposing catchy sales hooks and smooshing them together with gorgeous stock vids. Plus, there’s a free tool to help you write killer Reels copy.

https://youtu.be/hEpklroSFSc

item.title: How to Create Faceless Instagram Reels Using Canva
item.description:
Instagram Reels are a great way to grow your audience and engagement. But if you’re not comfortable showing your face on camera, you might be wondering how to create Reels that are still engaging.

Watch the video:

https://youtu.be/HcN-E7Bb_Ks

Additional tips

  • Use a catchy soundtrack to make your Reel more engaging.

  • Add captions to your Reel so that people can understand it even if they have the sound off.

  • Use relevant hashtags to help people find your Reel.

By following these tips, you can create faceless Instagram Reels that are both engaging and effective.

Get started with Canva Pro FREE

Start creating

Check out these aesthetic video sets

Ready to use aesthetic social video sets for your faceless accounts

Hautestock

Save 15% off with my link

item.title: Faceless Marketing: How to Create Engaging Content Without Showing Your Face + where to find aesthetic videos
item.description:
Have you ever considered creating online content but felt discouraged by the idea of being on camera? If so, faceless marketing might be the perfect solution for you!

Watch video

https://youtu.be/Hgvbk1seLZU

Faceless creators are individuals who build audiences and share their knowledge and expertise online without ever revealing their faces. This approach offers several advantages, including:

  • Increased privacy: You can maintain a separation between your personal and professional lives.

  • Reduced pressure: Eliminate the stress of constantly needing to be camera-ready.

  • Content focus: By not showing your face, you can concentrate on creating high-quality, niche-specific content that resonates with your target audience.

If you’re interested in getting started with faceless marketing, here are some of the recommended resources mentioned in the video:

item.title: How to edit a PLR product in Canva! Rebrand a PLR product to sell quickly and easily
item.description:
Are you looking to create your own digital products but don’t have the time or design skills to start from scratch? This blog post is for you! In this video, you’ll learn how to edit PLR (private label rights) digital products in Canva to match your brand.

PLR products are digital products that you can purchase with the right to edit and resell them as your own. This can be a great way to save time and money when creating your own product line. But how do you edit a PLR product to make it look like your own? In this blog post, we’ll walk you through the steps of editing a PLR digital planner in Canva.

Watch here

https://youtu.be/JqdCoiCoCw4

item.title: 50 Genius Digital Product Ideas That Will Make You an Etsy Millionaire (Okay, Maybe Not, But Definitely Rich-er!)
item.description:
Ever scrolled through Etsy, dazzled by the endless array of digital goodies, and thought, “Hey, I could do that!”? Well, guess what? You absolutely can!

The world of digital products is booming, offering amazing opportunities for creators like you to turn your passions into profit. But with so many options, where do you even begin? Fear not, fellow maker! Buckle up, because we’re about to dive into a treasure trove of 50 digital product ideas that will spark your creativity and get your Etsy shop (or other platform) humming.

From printables to planners, ebooks to online courses, there’s something for everyone in this list. So, grab your favorite beverage, settle in, and let’s explore the exciting world of digital product possibilities!

item.title: How to create a faceless Instagram or Tiktok account to make Passive Income
item.description:
Ever wondered if you can grow on Instagram or TikTok without showing your face and still make some sweet passive income? Good news – it’s totally possible! Let’s dive into how you can create a faceless account on these platforms and turn it into a passive income stream.

1. Niche Down Without Showing Off

First things first, pick a niche that doesn’t require you to be the face of the brand. Think about areas like gaming, cooking, art, travel, books, hobbies, or pets. These niches are perfect for creating content that focuses on the subject rather than on you.

2. Brand It Right

Once you’ve got your niche, it’s all about branding. Instead of personal branding, use clear photos or logos that scream your industry. Your username should also reflect your niche. This way, your brand identity is tied to what you do, not who you are.

item.title: How to Start Affiliate Marketing with No Money for Busy Women - A step by step guide!
item.description:
Are you ready to dive into the world of affiliate marketing but feel like there’s just no room in your hectic schedule (or budget) for another complicated endeavor? Well, I’ve got some fantastic news for you!

I’m here to guide you through the exciting journey of starting affiliate marketing with absolutely no money upfront. That’s right – zero dollars, but potentially huge returns! This course is specially crafted for you, the busy woman, whether you’re a full-time professional, a supermom, or someone who’s just looking to make the most out of her time and passions.

We’ll start from the very basics, unraveling the mysteries of affiliate marketing in a way that’s easy to grasp and totally doable, even with your packed calendar. No overwhelming jargon, no impractical advice – just straightforward, actionable steps that you can integrate into your daily routine.

item.title: 25 Digital Product Ideas for Your Etsy Shop in 2024
item.description:
It’s an exciting time to be alive, isn’t it? With the world embracing digital products more than ever, I’ve been brainstorming some amazing ideas that you can use to kickstart or revamp your Etsy shop. So, grab a cup of coffee, settle in, and let’s dive into this treasure trove of digital product ideas that could be your next big hit!

Start your Etsy Shop with 40 FREE listings!

1. Customizable Planner Templates

We all love a bit of organization in our lives, don’t we? Offer a variety of planner templates tailored for different needs like daily schedules, goal setting, and project planning. They’re not just practical; they’re lifesavers!

2. E-Books on Personal Development

item.title: How to use RSS feed to post on Facebook Groups
item.description:
Are you looking for a way to keep your Facebook pages and groups buzzing with fresh content without spending hours crafting posts? Well, you’re in luck! Today, we’re diving into Circleboom’s fantastic feature that links RSS feeds directly to Facebook. This tool is a game-changer for anyone looking to streamline their social media strategy.

What is Circleboom?

First things first, let’s talk about Circleboom. It’s a versatile social media management tool that’s like a Swiss Army knife for your online presence. With Circleboom, you can juggle multiple social media accounts, including the big players like Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile, and Pinterest. It’s all about making your life easier and your social media more effective.

Key Features of Circleboom’s RSS Feed to Facebook Integration

Circleboom’s RSS feed to Facebook feature is packed with goodies. Let’s break them down:

item.title: Maximizing Engagement with ManyChat: A Game-Changer for Content Creators
item.description:
In today’s fast-paced digital world, small businesses and content creators are constantly seeking tools to enhance engagement and streamline their online interactions. That’s where ManyChat comes into play. This blog post will dive deep into what ManyChat is, its incredible features, and why it’s an indispensable tool for those looking to boost their online presence and business growth.

What is ManyChat?

  • A Brief Backstory: ManyChat started as a simple tool but has evolved into a robust platform that revolutionizes how we interact with our audience.

  • Core Purpose: It’s primarily designed to automate messaging through various social media platforms, making life easier for businesses and content creators alike.

  • Who’s it For? If you’re juggling multiple tasks and looking to efficiently manage your online interactions, ManyChat is your go-to solution.

item.title: Online courses to level up your digital planner business this new year
item.description:
As we step into the new year, it’s the perfect time to talk about growth, learning, and taking our digital planner businesses to the next level. And what better way to do this than by diving into the world of MasterClass? Yes, you heard it right – MasterClass, the platform where the best of the best share their secrets. Let me take you through why I think MasterClass is a goldmine for anyone in the digital planner business.

A Treasure Trove of Knowledge

First things first, let’s talk about what MasterClass is. It’s an online learning platform where experts from various fields teach you their craft. We’re talking about big names here – leaders, artists, chefs, designers, and more. The beauty of MasterClass is its diversity; there’s something for everyone. And for us in the digital planner world, this means access to courses on design, business strategies, marketing, and so much more.

item.title: Starting Your Podcasting Journey: A Beginner's FAQ Guide
item.description:
Hey there, fellow side hustlers and personal development enthusiasts! If you’ve ever toyed with the idea of starting a podcast but found yourself bewildered by the hows and whats, you’re in the right place. Today, I’m diving into the most common FAQs for beginners in the podcasting world. Let’s unravel the mysteries together and set you on the path to podcasting success!

1. What Equipment Do I Need to Start a Podcast?

Starting a podcast doesn’t require a studio full of expensive gadgets. Here are the essentials:

  • Microphone: A good quality USB microphone is a must for the best sound quality. Here are five highly-rated podcast microphones available on Amazon:

    • TONOR USB Microphone: This is a computer cardioid condenser PC gaming mic with a tripod stand & pop filter, ideal for streaming, podcasting, and vocal recording. Compatible with laptops and desktop Windows computers. Priced at $31.99.

item.title: How to Start Selling on TikTok
item.description:
Are you looking to tap into the exciting world of TikTok for your business? Well, you’re in luck! Today, I’m going to walk you through the ins and outs of selling on TikTok and TikTok Shop. Trust me, it’s not as daunting as it sounds, and it could be a game-changer for your business. So, let’s dive in!

1. Embrace the Power of LIVE Shopping and Shoppable Videos

First things first, TikTok isn’t just about viral dances and funny clips. It’s a powerhouse for live shopping and creating shoppable videos. Imagine showcasing your products in real-time, engaging with your audience, and making sales on the spot. Sounds pretty cool, right? And the best part? TikTok offers educational courses to help you master this art. So, whether you’re a pro or just starting, there’s something for everyone.

item.title: How to automatically DM Someone Who Comments on Your Instagram Post
item.description:
Ever wonder how people are doing this trend where you comment on a post to get an offer or download sent to your DM? Well, you’re not alone. And no, these people are not doing it manually! And guess what? There’s a nifty solution called ManyChat that can make your life a whole lot easier. Let’s dive into how you can use this tool to automate responses and send DMs, making your Instagram management a breeze.

Understanding ManyChat and Its Magic

ManyChat isn’t just another app; it’s your personal assistant for Instagram. It helps you automate responses, engage with your audience, and maintain that ever-important personal touch. Why is it a game-changer? Because it lets you focus on creating content while it handles the interaction part.

item.title: How to Start Selling on eBay in 2024
item.description:
Have you ever thought about expanding your business horizons by selling on eBay? With its vast global reach, eBay offers a fantastic platform for entrepreneurs like you to showcase and sell products. But, where do you start? And how can integrating eBay with Shopify make your life easier? Let’s dive into this exciting journey together!

1. Understanding eBay’s Marketplace

eBay isn’t just an auction site; it’s a diverse marketplace buzzing with activity. Whether you’re selling vintage items, handcrafted goods, or the latest tech gadgets, eBay connects you with millions of potential buyers worldwide. Embracing an omnichannel approach, which means selling on multiple platforms, is key in today’s e-commerce world. And that’s where eBay shines, offering you a platform to reach a global audience.

item.title: Best online course platform to create your own courses for 2024
item.description:
In a world where learning and development are increasingly shifting online, the right platform can be a game-changer for both educators and learners. Whether you’re an aspiring course creator, a professional seeking to upskill, or just a curious mind eager to explore new knowledge, this guide is tailored for you. We’ve meticulously researched and tested various platforms to bring you the top picks that stand out in terms of features, user experience, and overall value. So, dive in with us as we explore the cream of the crop in online education platforms, tailored to meet the diverse needs of the 2024 digital learning landscape!

What Are the Best Online Course Platforms?

Thinkific

Thinkific is a comprehensive online course platform that allows creators to develop, market, and sell their courses with complete control over their branding and content. It’s designed to be user-friendly, catering to both beginners and experienced course creators. With Thinkific, you can build a variety of courses, create custom websites for your content, and engage with your audience through quizzes, surveys, and discussions.

item.title: 10 PLR Digital Planners to Help You Make Passive Income in 2024
item.description:
If you’ve been searching for a way to make passive income, you’re in the right place. Today, we’re diving deep into the world of PLR digital planners available on Etsy. But first, let’s clear up a couple of things.

What is PLR?

PLR stands for “Private Label Rights.” In simple terms, it means you can purchase a product, like a digital planner, and have the rights to rebrand and resell it as your own. Imagine buying a cake mix, adding your own special ingredients, and then selling it as your unique recipe. That’s PLR in a nutshell!

Why Use PLR?

  1. Time-Saver: Creating products from scratch can be time-consuming. With PLR, the groundwork is already done for you.

  2. Cost-Effective: Hiring designers or spending hours designing can be expensive. PLR products are usually affordable.

item.title: How to make a Canva template to sell on Etsy
item.description:
Are you a creative looking to monetize your design skills? Selling Canva templates on Etsy can be a lucrative way to turn your passion into profit.

Canva is a popular design tool that allows users to create stunning graphics, social media posts, and marketing materials. With its user-friendly interface and extensive library of design assets, Canva is the perfect platform to create templates for others to use and customize.

In this blog post, we will guide you through the process of creating a Canva template that you can sell on Etsy. Whether you are a seasoned graphic designer or just starting out, this tutorial will provide you with the knowledge and resources you need to start selling your Canva templates on Etsy.

item.title: Easily make money with PLR planners
item.description:
The world of digital products has been a hot topic lately with all the online business ideas circulating Tiktok and other social media platforms. One exciting area of digital products is the use of PLR Planners, which can be a cost-effective and profitable method to enter this sector. But what is a PLR Planner, and how can it help you sell digital things online? We’ll answer these questions in this blog as we explore the potential of PLR Planners and answer some of the frequently asked questions about this attractive area.

What is a PLR planner?

PLR is an abbreviation for Private Label Rights, which implies you can buy the rights to a product and personalize it to make it your own. A PLR planner is a digital or printable planner template that you may purchase with PLR, allowing you to tweak and adapt the content, design, and branding to meet your or your clients’ needs.

item.title: How to make a digital planner to sell - Template available!
item.description:
Hey there! I’m thrilled to share my journey in creating and selling a digital planner on Etsy. If you’ve been thinking about diving into the world of digital goods, making a planner is a fantastic starting point. Let’s jump right in!

Step 1: Research Like a Pro

Before anything else, let’s play detective. I took a deep dive into existing Etsy planners to see what’s hot and what buyers are craving. From daily to fitness planners, I scoped out the scene to craft something truly unique and in-demand. And guess what? Tools like SaleSamurai and eRank were my best pals in this quest!

You can use Etsy research tools like SaleSamuri or eRank to find trending planners

Step 2: Designing Dreams

Once I had my planner type pinned down, the real fun began - designing! Using Canva and Adobe Illustrator, I chose a catchy color scheme and fonts to bring my planner to life. And let me tell you, throwing in some snazzy design elements was a game-changer. Want to try it yourself?

item.title: How to Sell on Etsy in 2023 | All your questions answered
item.description:
If you’re reading this, you’re likely interested in making money online and have chosen Etsy as your preferred platform. With millions of buyers and sellers, Etsy is the perfect marketplace for creative entrepreneurs to showcase their handmade, vintage, or unique items.

As a beginner, you might have a lot of questions about how to sell on Etsy. This comprehensive guide is designed to answer all the possible questions you may have, and to help you launch your Etsy shop with confidence. So, let’s dive in!

What can I sell on Etsy?

Etsy is a marketplace primarily for handmade, vintage (at least 20 years old), and craft supplies. These are the main categories:

  • Handmade items: You can sell any product that you’ve created by hand. Examples include jewelry, clothing, accessories, home decor, and artwork.

item.title: What exactly is PLR? A Complete Overview of Private Label Rights
item.description:
If you’re a content creator or entrepreneur, you’ve probably heard of “PLR” or “Private Label Rights.” In a nutshell, PLR is a form of content that you can edit and use as your own. In this blog post, we’ll look at what PLR is, what sorts of content fall under PLR, how to sell PLR goods, generate money with PLR, and edit PLR products to make them distinctive.

What is PLR content?

PLR material is generated by someone else and sold with the right to edit, brand, and use it as your own. PLR material can range from ebooks to articles to blog posts to graphics and more. It’s a well-known resource for entrepreneurs and content providers in need of high-quality material for their businesses.

item.title: How to get your first sale on Etsy
item.description:
https://youtu.be/qn-3NS8PXyU

Video transcript

Hey there fellow Etsy sellers! If you’re watching this video, chances are you’ve recently set up your Etsy shop and are eagerly waiting for that first sale. I know how frustrating it can be to put your heart and soul into creating products, only to struggle with making your first sale. When I started my Etsy shop, I was in the same boat. But after trying a few different strategies, I finally made my first hard earned sale.

In this video, I want to share with you the four tips that helped me get my first sale on Etsy. SO let’s get started!

And disclaimer,

This is of course on the basis that you’ve done your market research and know that there are enough demand for your product. If you want to watch my video on how to find a profitable niche, check out my description!

item.title: How setup your Etsy Shop in 2023 | Step by Step Tutorial
item.description:
Are you looking to start your own Etsy shop?

I have you covered!

I made this tutorial so you can follow the setup process step-by-step. Or, if you’re not ready yet, you can follow along and so you can gather everything you need for the setup.

Why should you start a shop on Etsy?

With the increasing popularity of online shopping, Etsy has become a go-to platform for customers seeking unique and handmade items.

In fact, Etsy had 4.4 million active sellers and 90 million active buyers as of the end of 2020. Furthermore, Etsy has a global reach, which means that your products can be sold to customers from all over the world.

Etsy also provides a user-friendly platform that makes it easy to set up and manage your shop, with built-in features such as customizable storefronts, inventory management tools, and analytics.

item.title: How to get your first sale on Etsy
item.description:
I recently started a new Etsy shop, and I have my FIRST MONTH UPDATE!

If you’re looking to start your own shop and is researching on all the things or if you’ve started on already, but don’t now how to get your first sale WITHIN the FIRST MONTH, I have some tips for you!

Watch my video below for tips on getting your first sale QUICK!

Watch the video

https://youtu.be/SD1L25GfKB4

[sc name=“etsypostoffercta” ][/sc]

item.title: How to customize Acuity Scheduling with Canva templates
item.description:
Acuity Scheduling is a popular online scheduling tool that makes it easy to book appointments, manage clients, and keep track of your schedule. To make it even more functional and appealing to clients, you can customize it with Canva templates.

https://youtu.be/_swNs4jsnrk

Here are the steps to customize Acuity Scheduling with Canva templates:

Sign up for Canva:

If you haven’t already, sign up for Canva, an easy-to-use graphic design tool.

Find a template on Etsy

We have a few you might be interested in, available in our shop!

Customize the template

Once you have selected a template, use Canva’s design tools to add your logo, change the colors, and update the text to reflect your brand.

Save your design

When you’re happy with your design, save it as a PNG or JPG file.

item.title: 🎬 Canva Tip: How to design instagram posts and schedule your feed
item.description:
Learn how you can create instagram posts on Canva and then schedule it to your Instagram right on a platform. This feature has saved me a lot of time in the past and I don’t think this is a feature that a lot of people know about!

Instagram // Youtube // Etsy Shop

Watch along on Youtube!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5uYNrSc1DpY

Subscribe for more videos and templates!

Watch my Youtube video for the full tutorial!

Other videos you might be interested in:

[sc name=“affiliate_disclosure” ][/sc]

Pin it!

item.title: 30 Digital Products To Sell On Etsy
item.description:
Digital products are consistently one of the most in-demand categories on Etsy. Etsy shoppers take advantage of them every day for simple DIY projects.

Selling digital downloads is a great way to start earning passive income, for both sellers and designers. With low upfront costs, you can start creating and selling your products in days.

Below, you will find 30 of the most popular digital products on Etsy, and what you should consider before choosing one to sell.

If you love digital products, then this article is for you!

Etsy is a fantastic marketplace for digital products.

Here are some reasons why you should consider selling on Etsy:

One great benefit of digital products is that you don’t need to worry about producing inventory. Once you’ve created your product, it can sell over and over again–without any additional effort on your part. Even better, once we get it set up, we’ll take care of everything for you.

item.title: How to start a Blog in 2022
item.description:
There’s been so many new ways to make money and ways to create content through social media nowadays - so does that mean blogging is dead?  After all, there are already millions of blogs out there. Why add one more? 

It’s our new way of getting information

Whether it’s your news, magazine or other reading material, you can bet that blogging will be here to stay.  It’s just THE way to get information these days.  

It might not be called a “blog” anymore, but websites or any kind is the way of life now. It is where all information is located.  And everybody is searching for things on the internet.

So you’re thinking of turning a blog in 2022 is it too late to start a blog actually it’s a great time to start blog because it’s never too late.

item.title: Blogging Income Report | January 2022
item.description:
January 2022

A new year means new ventures!  I started this in the last few months of 2021 as a “home” for all my freebies and resources.  This year, I want to grow it and see how far I can go!

If you’d like to follow along with how I’m monetizing my blog and other online platforms, then check back every month for my income reports!

As a disclosure, this is not my first time making money online, so I already have some experience. You can see my old income reports here - but I’ve taken a huge hiatus since then and am coming back with little to now product and a brand new blog!  Nothing comes without some trial and error!  I’m coming back refreshed with a new mindset to try and grow my digital strategies.  My goal this time is to share it here because I know people that are just starting out would love to see all the things that go on behind the scenes!

item.title: Income Report - February 2022
item.description:
The second month of the year and I have lots of ideas!!

I’ve been trying to scale back and trying to keep my content alive - if that’s even possible.  So in order to do this, I’ve tried out a lot of new software this month!

Well, enough talk, let’s dig into our income report for 2022.

Here are a few things I’ll cover in this report

  • Monthly traffic/ followers
  • Breakdown of income
  • Summary of what I did this month
  • Goals for next month

Monthly Traffic

February traffic

Blog: 4,636 views

Pinterest: 742 followers

Youtube: 746 subscribers

Instagram: 2116 followers (something that I’m not actively growing)

Income

  • Etsy shop: $43.21

  • Affiliates: $75.74

  • Adsense: $36.80

Expense

* read about all the tools I use in the section below!

item.title: Income Report 💰 July 2016
item.description:
JULY INCOME REPORT

Etsy Income: $305.63
Shopify Store: $642.11
Collaboration revenue 1: $109.73
Collaboration revenue 2: $26.08
Other contributions: $8.13

Total Income: $1091.68

JULY EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $119.91

Etsy fees: oops..I forgot to pay
Paypal fees: $34.25
Affiliate commission: $49.77
Advertising and promotion: $40.52
Misc business charges: $170

Total Expenses: $414.45 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $677.23

☘☘☘

July Shop Update

July was a month of reflection.  I am slowly switching gears and trying to find balance in my personal life.  I’ve been neglecting my health and just social circles the few months since I’ve been really focusing on my side-hustle business.  Towards the end of this month, I’ve decided to put my shop in the back burner a bit and focus on my personal goals. Because of this, I expect next month to have a bit of dip in sales + profit.

item.title: Income Report 💰 June 2016
item.description:
JUNE INCOME REPORT

Etsy Income: $515.60
Shopify Store: $142.81
Collaboration revenue 1: $244.34
Collaboration revenue 2: $375.11
Other contributions: $2.46

Total Income: $1280.32

JUNE EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $32.11
Etsy fees: $222.60
Paypal fees: $7.72
Affiliate commission: $26.09
Advertising and promotion: $24.75
Wireless charges: $153.18

Total Expenses: $466.45 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $781.55

June was a busy month.  I have been putting my shop in the back burner for a bit because I’ve shifted my focus for a bit for personal reasons and I was also on a little mini vacation to Hawaii!  

But this was also the the month where I decided to get back full force and do some major house keeping for my shop.

item.title: Income Report 💰 May 2016
item.description:
So… I’ve been seeing these around a lot.  I always wonder why people would post their income report and …I still wonder.  There may be many reasons, but I want to start posting mine because I want to reflect on my growth (or lack of) each month – and hopefully this exercise will push me to stay on top of my bookkeeping!! So here goes…

MAY INCOME

Etsy Income: $78.17
Shopify Store: $106.38
Collaboration revenue: $662.05

Total Income: $846.60

MAY EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $148.96
Paypal fees: $6.68
Affiliate commission: $4.54
Advertising and promotion: $55.48

Total Expenses: $215.66 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $630.97

As you can see, I’m pretty small peanuts compared to other people out there.  I might also note that this has been one of the “good” months because some payments only came through now from last month.  So this is also a good lesson that what you see on someone’s inflated monthly income can be a big deceiving sometimes.
